name: PRUNE BELLY SYNDROME
definition: EAGLE-BARRETT SYNDROME congenital nonhereditary multisystem disorder; almost exclusively in males complete absence / marked deficiency of corpora cavernosa + corpus spongiosum congenital absence / deficiency of corpus spongiosum with a normal glans +

demographics.Histo: diffuse increase in connective tissue with replacement of smooth muscle

general: dilated tortuous ureters + focal areas of narrowing
lobulated kidneys with dilated collecting system of bizarre shape
Bladder: thickened bladder wall without trabeculations ← replacement by fibrocytes + collagen
large distended urinary bladder with a capacity of 600-800 mL
Urethra: elongated + dilated prostatic urethra with tapering of membranous urethra
absent / markedly hypoplastic prostate → infertility and enlarged prostatic urethra
enlarged prostatic utricle (= small epithelium-lined diverticulum representing the remnant
urethral obstruction: stenosis / atresia / dorsal chordae / posterior urethral valves (in
Ureters: massively dilated tortuous elongated ureters affecting the lower ⅓ more profoundly
poor ureteral peristalsis ← decrease in number of nerves + degeneration of
Kidneys: asymmetry of renal size + lobulated contours
renal dysplasia with cystic dysplastic changes, oligohydramnios, pulmonary hypoplasia

clinical.Prognosis: in 20% [50%] death within 1 month [2 years] ← renal failure ± pulmonary
clinical.Rx: internal urethrotomy, cutaneous vesicostomy, reduction cystoplasty, ureteral
